description.value:
Fragmentary older translation in the runic script of Hyperborea. Rumor has it older editions penned by prehuman races still exist. Records a cycle of mythic history detailing the rise and fall of forgotten human and prehuman civilizations. Focuses on Hyperborea and fabled Lomar, as well as legends of the cannibal Gnoph-keh and six-legged totem beasts. Details Great Old Ones Rhan-Tegoth and Aphoom-Zhah, as well as star-headed Winged Ones.

LanguageHyperborean
AuthorUnknown
DateAncient origin
Sanity Loss2D8
Cthulhu Mythos+6/+12 percentiles
Mythos Rating54
Study (weeks)54

Spells Contained

  • Contact Winged One (Contact Elder Thing)
  • Contact Walker in the Wastes (Contact Gnoph-Keh)

system.author: Unknown
